pages.title: Results of the Household and Individual Interviews
pages.description: Number of households, number of interviews, and response rates, according to residence (unweighted): Philippines, 2025.

pages.title: Background Characteristics of Respondents
pages.description: Distribution of survey respondents (women aged 15-49) by region. Source: Philippine Statistics Authority, 2025 National Demographic and Health Survey.

pages.title: Antenatal Care
pages.description: Among women aged 15 to 49 years who had a live birth and/or a stillbirth in the 2 years preceding the survey, percentage who received antenatal care (ANC) from a skilled provider for the most recent live birth or stillbirth, percentage with four or more ANC visits for the most recent live birth or stillbirth, percentage who took any iron-containing supplements during pregnancy, and percentage whose most recent live birth was protected against neonatal tetanus. Source: Philippine Statistics Authority, 2025 National Demographic and Health Survey.
pages.chartSubtitle: Among women aged 15 to 49 years who had a live birth and/or a stillbirth in the 2 years preceding the survey, percentage who received antenatal care (ANC) from a skilled provider for the most recent live birth or stillbirth, percentage with four or more ANC visits for the most recent live birth or stillbirth, percentage who took any iron-containing supplements during pregnancy, and percentage whose most recent live birth was protected against neonatal tetanus, according to background characteristics: Philippines, 2022 and 2025
pages.chartBlockSubtitle: Women aged 15 to 49 years with a live birth in the 2 years preceding the survey.

pages.title: Birth Delivery
pages.description: Among all live births and stillbirths in the 2 years before the survey, percentage delivered by a skilled provider and percentage delivered in a health facility, and percentage delivered by a cesarean section. Source: Philippine Statistics Authority, 2025 National Demographic and Health Survey.
pages.chartSubtitle: Among all live births and stillbirths in the 2 years before the survey, percentage delivered by a skilled provider and percentage delivered in a health facility, and percentage delivered by a cesarean section, according to background characteristics: Philippines, 2022 and 2025
pages.chartBlockSubtitle: Live births and stillbirths in the 2 years preceding the survey.

pages.title: Postnatal Check
pages.description: Among women aged 15 to 49 years with a live birth or stillbirth in the 2 years preceding the survey, percentage who received a postnatal check during the first 2 days after giving birth. Source: Philippine Statistics Authority, 2025 National Demographic and Health Survey.
pages.chartSubtitle: Selected postnatal check indicators by background characteristic and region: Philippines, 2022 and 2025
pages.chartBlockSubtitle: Women aged 15 to 49 years with a live birth in the 2 years preceding the survey.

pages.title: Children Aged 12 to 23 Months - Vaccination Status
pages.description: Percentage of children aged 12 to 23 months fully vaccinated (basic antigens), percentage fully vaccinated (according to national schedule), and percentage who received no vaccinations, at any time before the survey (according to a vaccination card or the mother's report). Source: Philippine Statistics Authority, 2025 National Demographic and Health Survey.

pages.title: Intimate Partner Violence
pages.description: Percentage of women aged 15 to 49 years who have ever had a husband or intimate partner who have ever experienced emotional, physical, or sexual violence committed by their current or most recent husband/intimate partner. Source: Philippine Statistics Authority, 2025 National Demographic and Health Survey.

pages.description: Total fertility rate for the 3 years preceding the survey. Source: Philippine Statistics Authority, 2025 National Demographic and Health Survey.
